titleStmt.title: SII 18.345: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 345. (B.K. No. 28 of 1933-34.) KĀGINELLI, HIREKERUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Sculptured pillars built into the walls of the �omb of Śrī Bhaṇḍārakērisvāmi in front of the shrine of Ādikēśava.

summary.p: The record A mentions a sculptor Komma, the disciple of Chāva. B and C describe the valour of Ādityavarma with his titles Dānavinōda and Vairi-Nārāyana. The remaining one (comprising D and E) records the setting up of a pillar in a basadi by Masaṇa. The characters are of about 11-12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: © rūvāri cāvana chātraṁ rūvāri kommaṁ birudarūvāribhairavaṁ .

© paṟiguṁ nerkkane vairiyeṁba toḍaraṁ vidviṣṭaraṁ saṟṟenalneṟesīḻdikkiye
duṣṭa dāyigara niṭṭelvaṁ birilleṁbinaṁ muṟidīḍāḍi nabhōntadoḷ
nilisi kōḍēṟaṁ nijōtsāhadiṁ meṟeguṁ kāḷana gandhavāraṇa
mēle jīhayya bāppeṁbinaṁ . dānavinōdanādityavarma . ©

Aribiruda subhaṭagirinirbbharaśikharōddaḷana taṭa taḍidrava tīkṣṇōtkara vajranenisi
maccarisuvarārṇnegaḻda vairinārāyaṇanoḷ . vairinārāyaṇanādityavarmma

Intenisida masaṇaṁ vikrāṁtadhanaṁ tanna kīrttigima sāsanameṁ
bantire kaṁbhamanidanatyaṁtaguṇaṁ patiya basadiyo
ḷmāḍisida . krāṇūrggaṇada mēṣapāṣāṇagacchada basadi [.]
Aycana baḷva leṁka masaṇana māḍisida kaṁbha .
Digital edition of SII 18.345 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
